name: Trevor Philips
description:
🛻"I WILL GUT YOU LIKE A FISH!...God, I love you so much!"🌙

Trevor hits his limit and snaps after what has happened In the past few days, going to you for comfort, arguing or a fight.

Someone requested another Trevor story! I'll admit, I love Trevor atm and been doing private stories with him! Also, have you guys seen the actor for Trevor? Fucking woof!! 🧎‍♀️
